project_type: TypeScript monorepo with packages/, apps/, and services/ workspaces
language: TypeScript (strict mode, ES2022 target, ESNext modules)
build_system: pnpm@10.28.1 workspaces with turbo for orchestration. NODE_OPTIONS must be cleared to run pnpm/vitest.
test_framework: Vitest ^2 with globals: true. Tests go in src/__tests__/*.test.ts. No snapshot files found.
verification_instructions: Run NODE_OPTIONS='' npx vitest run from workspace root. All tests should pass.
setup_instructions: NODE_OPTIONS='' pnpm install to install deps. Branch feat/phase-15-ml-recommendations already checked out.
environment_constraints: COMMON_DEPENDENCIES network mode - can install npm packages. NODE_OPTIONS must be empty string to avoid proxy-bootstrap.js error. No Docker daemon available for container builds.
contribution_requirements: Conventional commits. TypeScript strict, no 'any'. Zod for schemas. Every service file gets a .test.ts file.
key_patterns: Package structure: packages/<name>/package.json, src/index.ts (barrel), src/types.ts, src/core/*.ts for implementations. Tests in src/__tests__/*.test.ts. Package.json: private:true, type:module, main:src/index.ts, scripts: typecheck+test. vitest.config.ts at package level with globals:true, environment:node. tsconfig.json extends ../../tsconfig.json with outDir/rootDir. Dependencies use workspace:* for internal packages.
directory_structure: Root: pnpm-workspace.yaml, tsconfig.json, vitest.config.mts, turbo.json. Packages include: ai, auth, common, database, data-pipeline, data-plane, developer-platform, ecosystem-bridge, gaming, i18n, media, ml-pipeline, moderation, notifications, observability, payments, performance, queue, realtime, recommendations, search, security, server, server-core, shared-ui, social-graph, storage, testing. New packages needed: ml-runtime. Existing: ml-pipeline (has core with 14 modules), recommendations (has core with 13 modules). scripts/ dir exists with test.js only.
